source: Seed articles (article-level publisher URLs) — replaced by Google News RSS at 7AM + 4PM IST

articles.title: Why term insurance is the smartest financial decision you can make
articles.summary: Financial planners recommend term insurance as the foundation of any plan. Pure protection beats investment-cum-insurance products on every metric.

articles.title: How to choose the right sum assured for your term insurance plan
articles.summary: Choosing adequate cover is critical for family protection. Experts recommend the Human Life Value method over the simple income-multiple rule.

articles.title: Health insurance portability: How to switch insurers without losing benefits
articles.summary: Switching health insurance while keeping accumulated waiting-period credits is now easier. Here is the step-by-step portability guide.

articles.title: Claim settlement ratio FY25: How to read it before buying insurance
articles.summary: CSR shows what percentage of death claims an insurer settled. Learn why claim amount ratio matters more than the headline number.

articles.title: IRDAI Bima Sugam: One platform for buying and servicing all insurance
articles.summary: IRDAI's unified marketplace aims to simplify buying, servicing and claims through a single digital platform for all Indian policyholders.

articles.title: IRDAI extends free look period to 30 days for all insurance policies
articles.summary: The regulator extended the free look period from 15 to 30 days, giving policyholders more time to review and return new policies for a full refund.

articles.title: IRDAI master circular on insurance products: Key changes explained
articles.summary: IRDAI consolidated all regulations for linked and non-linked insurance products into one master circular effective April 2024.

articles.title: Section 80C: Complete guide to life insurance tax benefits
articles.summary: Life insurance premiums qualify for deduction up to Rs 1.5 lakh under Section 80C. This guide covers eligibility, limits and conditions with examples.

articles.title: Section 80D: Claim health insurance premium deduction up to Rs 1 lakh
articles.summary: Section 80D allows deduction of health premiums for self, family and parents. Limit is Rs 25,000, rising to Rs 50,000 for senior citizens.

articles.title: GST on insurance premiums: What rate applies on term, health and ULIP
articles.summary: Insurance premiums attract 18 percent GST. This article explains GST applicability across term, health, ULIP and group insurance products.

articles.title: SIP vs lump sum: Which mutual fund strategy works better in 2025?
articles.summary: SIPs offer rupee cost averaging while lump sums can outperform during dips. A data-driven comparison for Indian investors.

articles.title: Best ELSS funds 2025: Tax saving with equity growth potential
articles.summary: ELSS funds offer 80C deduction with the lowest lock-in of 3 years among all tax-saving instruments. Here are the top performers.

articles.title: RBI repo rate decision: Impact on home loan EMI and insurance returns
articles.summary: The RBI's repo rate decision directly affects home loan EMIs and insurance company investment portfolios, impacting participating policy bonuses.

articles.title: Bank FD rates vs insurance endowment plans: Where to park savings?
articles.summary: Bank FDs now offer 7-8 percent while endowment plans return 4-5 percent. We compare risk, liquidity and tax efficiency of both options.

articles.title: How Sensex and Nifty rally impacts your ULIP fund value in 2025
articles.summary: The equity rally has boosted ULIP fund values. Policyholders in equity-oriented funds should review asset allocation now.

articles.title: Insurance sector stocks: How listed insurers are performing in 2025
articles.summary: Shares of HDFC Life, SBI Life, ICICI Prudential Life and others have shown mixed performance amid the broader market rally.

articles.title: How to calculate exactly how much term insurance you need
articles.summary: Most Indians are severely under-insured. Learn the Human Life Value method to calculate the precise cover your family needs.

articles.title: Emergency fund and insurance: Why you need both and how to build them
articles.summary: An emergency fund covers short-term shocks while insurance handles catastrophes. How to build both without straining your budget.

articles.title: NPS vs life insurance for retirement: Which should you choose?
articles.summary: NPS offers flexibility and market-linked growth; insurance annuities offer guaranteed income. A complete comparison for retirement planning.
